mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM osh_bbs_support WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_bbs_support (post_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM osh_bbs_support WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_bbs_comment ( post_id, content, reply_id, reply_user_id, user_id, create_time ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{content}, #{replyId}, #{replyUserId}, #{userId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_bbs_post SET is_delete = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.nick_name as nickName, u.avatar as avatar, u.sex as sex FROM osh_bbs_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT count(1) FROM osh_bbs_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_bbs_post ( category_id, content, title, user_id, comment_count, support_count, is_top, create_time, is_delete ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{content}, #{title}, #{userId}, 0, 0, 0, #{createTime}, 0 )
